title: Senior Software Engineer - Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises:
Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises!
